title: D-kyuu Boukensha no Ore, Naze ka Yuusha Party ni Kanyuu Sareta Ageku, Oujo ni Tsukima Towareteru
titleRomaji: D-kyuu Boukensha no Ore, Naze ka Yuusha Party ni Kanyuu Sareta Ageku, Oujo ni Tsukima Towareteru
titleNative: D級冒険者の俺、なぜか勇者パーティーに勧誘されたあげく、王女につきまとわれてる
synonyms: I’m a D-Rank Adventurer, for Some Reason I Got Recruited Into a Hero Party, and Now the Princess Is Stalking Me
synopsis: If you become a hero and defeat the Demon King, a life of idleness awaits you...! This is what the young man Jirei believed, and he worked hard day and night to achieve his goal. However, when he found out that the heroes who defeated the Demon King were the ones who were doing all the hard work, he ran away. But the girls that Jirei had been saving on his journeys before he knew it came pouring in one after another to win his heart and body...?

synopsis: Lina Inverse, a wandering sorceress and bandit-killer, joins forces with roving swordsman Gourry Gabriev in what's supposed to be a quick union of convenience. Note: This is the main Slayers manga, adapted from the Slayers novels vol.1-8. The fourth volume is adapted from the Slayers Return movie.

title: Tetsuya: Jansei to Yobareta Otoko
titleNative: 哲也～雀聖と呼ばれた男～
synonyms: てつや じゃんせいとよばれたおとこ
哲也 雀聖と呼ばれた男
哲也 ―雀聖と呼ばれた男―
synopsis: In the year 1947, the people of Shinjuku are down on their luck. With little money to buy food or necessities, some resort to gambling in order to survive. Traveling Tetsuya chooses to spend his time at Mahjong parlors where he is wiping the floor clean with his adversaries. However, Tetsuya meets the intensely-skilled Boushu-san, this is when he realizes that his skills are still lacking. (Source: Anime News Network)

titleNative: エイハブ
synopsis: The story is set in the 19th century and follows a man who dedicates his life to fighting a giant whale. In those days, people used whale oil instead of petroleum to light their lamps, and the oil extracted from sperm whales was traded at a high price.

title: Himegasaki Sakurako Is a Hot Mess
titleRomaji: Himegasaki Sakurako wa Kyou mo Fubin Kawaii
titleEnglish: Himegasaki Sakurako Is a Hot Mess
titleNative: 姫ヶ崎櫻子は今日も不憫可愛い
synonyms: 姬之崎櫻子今天依然惹人憐愛
synopsis: Who wouldn’t have a thing for Himegasaki Sakurako? With her blonde pigtails, cute demeanor, and buxom body, she draws all of the eyes at school. If only her crush, Mimori Natsuki, saw her as more than his childhood gal pal! Can this loveable loser stop getting into embarrassing situations and finally land the boy of her dreams? (Source: Seven Seas Entertainment)

title: Wakaba Won’t Give Up!
titleNative: 若葉ちゃんはわからせたい！
synonyms: Wakaba-chan Wants to Make It Clear
synopsis: Wakaba is cocky, condescending, foul-mouthed, and absolutely in love with her childhood friend, Daiki. For as long as they’ve known each other, Wakaba’s been the very image of a roughhousing tomboy, but all that’s about to change. When she shows up in front of him, wearing a cutesy, feminine outfit, will she get the hopeless late bloomer’s heart racing? When you can’t put your feelings into words, an image change might just be the right gambit! (Source: Seven Seas Entertainment)

title: Tama Torarechattayoooo
titleNative: タマとられちゃったよおおおぉ
synopsis: The grim city of Oosaka is controlled by the Yakuza. On the secluded artificial island of Sakishima, there exists a rumour: There is a "wolf" out hunting the Yakuza. This wolf would use a demon sword to slay the Yakuza's dignity. That is, this sword has the ability to turn them into little girls!!!! A tale of the high-school student who hunts Yakuza and the former-Yakuza girl! These pretend-siblings with a bond too strong will face the Yakuza infesting Oosaka. This is a battle-filled and action-packed story of chivalry featuring big twists and turns!!!
searchTerms: タマとられちゃったよおおおぉ

title: Oishinbo
titleNative: 美味しんぼ
synopsis: Around the offices of Tozai News, Shiro Yamaoka has a reputation for being over-blunt, under-ambitious, and generally an all-around slacker. So why has he been given the important job of coming up with the "Ultimate Menu" to celebrate the newspaper's 100th anniversary? Because he possesses qualities his other colleagues don't: an exquisitely discerning palate, an encyclopedic knowledge of food and drink, and a masterful touch in the kitchen. (Source: VIZ Media)

title: Live Freely in Another World With an Equipment Manufacturing Cheat
titleRomaji: Soubi Seisaku Kei Cheat de Isekai wo Jiyuu ni Ikite Ikimasu
titleEnglish: Live Freely in Another World With an Equipment Manufacturing Cheat
titleNative: 装備製作系チートで異世界を自由に生きていきます
synonyms: Sobi Seisaku Kei Chi to De Isekai Wo Jiyu Ni Ikiteikimasu
I Will Live Freely in Another World With Equipment Manufacturing Cheat
synopsis: 29-year-old Toji, a job-hopping part-time worker, got caught up in someone else getting summoned to another world. Declared a troublemaker on arrival and thrown out of the castle, he was just about to lose all hope when a status screen from an online game he used to play popped up in front of his eyes. Amazingly, Toji can use that incredibly convenient game mechanic in this new world, and he's the only one! Upgrading weapons, summoning adorable monsters... Armed with all the knowledge and wit he can muster, Toji is free to venture wherever he pleases! (Source: Alpha Manga)

title: Blue Ursus
titleNative: ブルーウルスス
synopsis: Ready to fight! Only bad girls would go to Gokumon Girls' High School. A big girl, Amaki Seina, over 180cm tall, enrolls in this rough school full of delinquents. With her extraordinary physique, she uses professional wrestling moves to defeat the delinquents one after another! What's more, she uploads clips of the fights to a video site...? What is the "personal goal" she is pursuing by picking fights with delinquents?! (Source: Manga One, translated)

title: Tsuyokute New Game na Love Come
titleRomaji: Tsuyokute New Game na Love Come
titleNative: つよくてニューゲームなラブコメ
synopsis: Komine is an ordinary grade-school kid who is at the top of his class. And for good reason - after dying, this is actually his second run at life. Knowing everything from upcoming class subjects to future events, Komine naturally excels at whatever he does. …and then there’s Sarara Miyano, Komine’s classmate. The last time he was in school, he was despised by her because of some foolish actions he took in the past. But now that he’s mentally older and wiser, maybe he can turn things around?

title: Cells at Work! Cat
titleNative: はたらく細胞 猫
synopsis: Red Blood Cell, White Blood Cell (Neutrophil), and their team put on their cat ears as they work, day and night to fight the invaders big and small to make sure these feline friends are happy, healthy, purring machines! Explore the action taking place inside a cat’s body, in Cells at Work! style, while also seeing the perspective from the humans who provide a home and tender loving care. (Source: Kodansha USA)

synopsis: Fleur, the daughter of a baron, has been plagued by the advances of Victor, the son of a duke and a genius at magic, ever since he proposed to her as a child. So she tries to retaliate against him, which embarrasses her, but... it ends up making him happy, saying, "I'm so glad you think of me that much!" (Source: Kadokawa, translated)

title: Seishiki ni Majo ni Natta Nidome no Akuyaku Oujo wa, Mou Futatabi to Taisetsu na Mono wo Ushinawanai to Kokoro ni Chikau @COMIC
titleRomaji: Seishiki ni Majo ni Natta Nidome no Akuyaku Oujo wa, Mou Futatabi to Taisetsu na Mono wo Ushinawanai to Kokoro ni Chikau @COMIC
titleNative: 正式に魔女になった二度目の悪役皇女は、もう二度と大切な者を失わないと心に誓う@COMIC
synopsis: Princess Alice, who was turned back to her 10-year-old self with the "witch's power" before she died, meets Theodore, a heretic (Nox). He is the most hated and shunned member of the Knights' Order, but for a girl who was killed because of her crimson hair, he is the only person who can share her loneliness! However, contrary to the rumors (of the past), she is intelligent and gets caught up in a battle over the right to inherit the throne...? "Would you like to become a witch's knight out of self-interest?" "That's a ridiculous invitation, I don't think you're a princess, is it?" A relife story of a figurehead princess and a lonely knight who finally meet, both of whom have "crimson"! (Source: TO Books, translated)

titleNative: 魔王様、リトライ! R
synopsis: The Demon Lord continues his adventure in this re-vamped series! After encountering the mysterious entity in the lowest level of the Bastille Dungeon, he sets out for Hellion Territory, where Grand Devils vie for domination of the realm. With the addition of a new advisor—the (seemingly) hopeless optimist Akane—the Demon Lord’s army grows even more colorful, and their hijinks even wackier. (Source: J-Novel Club)

title: Mimi's Tales of Terror
titleNative: ミミの怪談
synonyms: Las historias de fantasmas de Mimi
synopsis: University student Mimi and her boyfriend Naoto encounter one chilling mystery after another. There’s the enigmatic neighbor woman dressed in black from head to toe—but if she’s so odd, why does it seems like there are many others like her? Then, whose eyes track Mimi’s movements from the cemetery next door? And why does a bizarre red circle drawn on a basement wall change with each passing day? Nine scary stories that really happened, drawn from the famed collection of urban legends Shin Mimibukuro (New Earmuffs), and adapted into manga by horror genius Junji Ito! Chapter 1: On the Utility Pole Chapter 2: The Woman Next Door Chapter 3: Rustling in the Grass Chapter 4: Grave Placement Chapter 5: Seashore Chapter 6: Just the Two of Us Chapter 7: Scarlet Circle Chapter 8: Sign in the Field Chapter 9: Monster Prop (Source: VIZ Media)

title: Ochinai Yogore wo Boku wa Nanto Yobeba Yokatta noka
titleRomaji: Ochinai Yogore wo Boku wa Nanto Yobeba Yokatta noka
titleNative: 落ちない汚れを僕は何と呼べばよかったのか
synonyms: What Was I Meant to Call This Mess That Wouldn't Go Away?
synopsis: This world is filthy… Nakayama, a high school boy with an extreme case of germophobia, avoids all social interaction and tries to enjoy his private time alone in a perfectly clean space. But his peaceful days are constantly disrupted by Nishino-san, the cheerful and unpredictable girl who ends up sitting next to him. "Don’t pollute my sanctuary! Don’t intrude on my time!" Contrary to his wishes, day after day, Nakayama is at Nishino's mercy in this chatty rom-com about a germophobe and an unsophisticated high school girl!! (Source: Kadokawa, translated)
